title: EMS5G — Scalability & Capacity Dashboard (500 Cells)
description: Comprehensive monitoring dashboard for EMS5G Non-Multi-Tenant scalability testing up to 500 cells. Tracks CPU, Memory, Disk, Databases, Pod health, per-service metrics, and Fluentd logging across all services.

panels.title: CPU Utilization % by Pod
panels.description: CPU usage as percentage of limit

targets.expr: 100 * sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace="${namespace}", pod=~"${pod}", container!="", container!="POD"}[$interval])) by (pod) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace="${namespace}", pod=~"${pod}", resource="cpu"}) by (pod)

panels.title: CPU Throttling by Pod
panels.description: CPU CFS throttle duration - high values indicate CPU starvation

panels.title: CPU Requests vs Usage
panels.description: CPU requests vs actual usage - helps with right-sizing

panels.title: Memory Usage vs Limits
panels.description: Memory working set vs configured limits

panels.title: Memory Utilization % by Pod
panels.description: Memory as percentage of limit - alerts should fire >85%

targets.expr: 100 * sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="${namespace}", pod=~"${pod}", container!="", container!="POD"}) by (pod) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace="${namespace}", pod=~"${pod}", resource="memory"}) by (pod)

panels.title: Memory Requests vs Usage
panels.description: Memory requests vs actual usage for capacity planning

panels.title: Container Filesystem Usage by Pod
panels.description: Filesystem bytes used inside each container

panels.title: Container FS Usage % of Limit
panels.description: Filesystem usage as percentage of filesystem limit

targets.expr: sum(container_fs_usage_bytes{namespace="${namespace}", pod=~"${pod}", container!=""}) by (pod) / sum(container_fs_limit_bytes{namespace="${namespace}", pod=~"${pod}", container!=""}) by (pod) * 100

panels.title: PostgreSQL — Tuples Inserted/s
panels.description: Rate of tuples inserted per database

panels.title: PostgreSQL — Tuples Updated/s
panels.description: Rate of tuples updated per database

panels.title: PostgreSQL — Tuples Deleted/s
panels.description: Rate of tuples deleted per database

panels.title: Cassandra — Client Read Latency
panels.description: Client read request latency (try both metric name conventions)

panels.title: Cassandra — Pending Compactions & Connections
panels.description: Pending compaction tasks and connected clients

panels.title: Kafka — Messages In/s
panels.description: Kafka message ingestion rate per topic

panels.title: Kafka — Consumer Lag
panels.description: Consumer group lag - high lag indicates consumers can't keep up

panels.title: Kafka — Log Size
panels.description: Kafka log segment size per topic

targets.expr: sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace="${namespace}", container!="", container!="POD"}[$interval])) by (pod) * on(pod) group_left(owner_name) label_replace(kube_pod_owner{namespace="${namespace}", owner_kind="ReplicaSet"}, "pod", "$1", "pod", "(.*)")

panels.title: Fluentd — Log Records Output Rate
panels.description: Rate of log records emitted by Fluentd

panels.title: Fluentd — Buffer Queue Length
panels.description: Buffer queue length — high values indicate output bottleneck

panels.title: Fluentd — Retry Count
panels.description: Output retry count — sustained retries indicate destination issues

panels.title: Fluentd — Emit Records vs Flush Time
panels.description: Emit rate and flush time tracking

panels.title: Container Log Generation (stderr + stdout)
panels.description: Container log output rate by pod (if metric available)
